message:
test(scripting): property-based tests for events and keybindings modules

Add 12 proptests for EventBus (pattern matching invariants, hook count
consistency, fire count accuracy, extension tracking, tier ordering) and
10 proptests for KeybindingRegistry (modifier roundtrip, key combo
roundtrip, alias equivalence, register/unregister counts, dispatch
correctness, bound_combos tracking).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
